fix_attempts.description: Enhanced textDocument/implementation for bi-directional .fs <-> .fsi navigation using symbol.SignatureLocation / symbol.ImplementationLocation
Updated v0.84.0 changelog — 18 entries since v0.83.0 — supersedes #1465
Fix type-forwarded type decompilation: check ParentModule vs MainModule, redirect decompiler to actual defining assembly
Resolve implementation assembly (Roslyn-style path lookup) before decompiling to fix throw null in reference assemblies
Skip unreadable files (SourceLinked paths) in rename handler; remove duplicate log in textDocument/implementation
Fix adjustInsertionPoint to skip past module declaration line when ScopeKind.Module; add isExplicitModuleDeclaration helper; regression test for issue #789

notes: Mar 2026 run (22906495111): Task6: audited all open Repo Assist PRs. Fixed PR #1482 (pushed itestCaseAsync for issues #1259 and #824 shadowing/nullable-join). Commented on PR #1484 (superseded by #1482) and PR #1494 (macOS infrastructure failures). Task3: Fixed issue #789 (open insertion inconsistency): adjustInsertionPoint now detects when FCS returns module declaration line for ScopeKind.Module and adjusts +1 to insert inside the module. New PR created (fix-issue-789-open-insertion-nearest). Prev notes: PR #1492 = type forwarder fix, #1493 = changelog, #1494 = .fsi/.fs navigation, #1491 = skip unreadable files, #1490 = ref assembly decompile, #1488 = IntroduceMissingBinding, #1483 = parens in chained call fix, #1482 = RemoveRedundantQualifier false-positive tests.
